overview: Giant Worm is a SubBoss-class Beast/Giant/Insect monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 1100 HP, 26 physical damage, 0 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 4, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Bite at 180% ratio (468 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Rush Attack.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 3 melee attacks. Bite (180%), Swing Body (130%), Rush Attack (170%).

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Rush Attack (170%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Accid
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Accid icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-4000), Earth (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Rush Attack
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Rush Attack. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Rush Attack

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
